# Domain-by-Domain Red Flag Matrix

| Domain | Key red flags | Stronger evidence needed |
|---|---|---|
| Short-form video | repeated clips, same captions, campaign timing, weak disclosure | campaign brief, payment terms, platform policy violation |
| Reviews | bursts, generic language, incentives, suppression | regulator finding, platform warning, leaked instruction, reviewer testimony |
| App stores | rating/review spikes, chart jump, low retention | platform enforcement, review analysis, install quality data |
| Product Hunt | vote surge, shallow comments, mass outreach | platform removal, outreach screenshots, account-cluster evidence |
| Search | content scale, low originality, domain mismatch | Google policy match, domain history, content audit |
| Ads | cheap leads, low contact quality, suspicious placements | CRM qualification data, platform invalid traffic reports |
| Mobile attribution | CTIT anomalies, post-install weakness | MMP fraud report, source comparison, app-store discrepancy |
| Music streaming | high streams with low saves/follows | platform fraud detection, law-enforcement record |
| Startups | metric inconsistency, vague definitions | admission, audited data, investor docs, press correction |
